text.title: Feature Flag Core Implementation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are you on a managed flag SDK already?

branch.when: sdk == openfeature OR launchdarkly OR growthbook

conclusion.verdict: use the SDK as the call site
if/else by env var is cheaper

text.example: Register flag new-checkout-flow default OFF → FF_NEW_CHECKOUT_FLOW=true in staging env → manager.is_enabled('new-checkout-flow', user_id) returns True → middleware decorates / handler with @feature.
